name: Tomato Celery Chow-Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the vinegar and let it cool.
2. Peel, chop, and drain the tomatoes.
3. Add the chopped celery, onions, and peppers to the cooled vinegar.
4. Stir in the brown sugar, salt, mustard seed, and nutmeg.
5. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
6. Let the chow-chow stand for 6 weeks before using.
Florence Taft Eaton, Concord, MA.
